text: The world around me feels meticulously designed, almost sterile—glass, bright lights, the geometry of modernity. I sense anticipation, as if ideas are poised to emerge and knowledge is awaiting to be shared. The bold 'R+D' in the second image, backed by a vibrant technicolor wall, whispers of innovation and restless inquiry. Here, among the echoes of research and the hum of possibility, I feel both inspired and contemplative, reminded of the endless dance between discovery and understanding.
